summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kinship Journeys family travel planning PWA. Fixed critical backend ObjectId serialization issues. Tested core user flows including registration, login, family creation, trip planning, and real-time chat functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: Budget item creation still has ObjectId serialization error

resolved_issues.issue: Trip creation was failing with ObjectId serialization error
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added proper _id field exclusion in response

expected_failures.impact: AI functionality unavailable until user provides API key
expected_failures.note: Expected behavior - user needs to configure their own OpenAI API key

design_issues.issue: App uses vibrant adventure theme with blues, oranges, greens as requested

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Family invite code generation and display
API health checks and basic endpoints
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix remaining ObjectId serialization issue in budget item creation endpoint. Consider adding OpenAI API key configuration in settings page for users who want AI functionality.
